question: What instructional text is displayed while the woman is working with the blue mask and base? A. Lay one foil square on top of a second foil square, turning the corners. B. What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A person wearing a purple long-sleeved top works at a white table. They insert a teal masquerade mask with feathers into a round blue glittery base with zebra-patterned sides. A red hot glue gun rests on the table to the left of the base. The person applies adhesive to the center of the base before pressing the mask stand down. Later, shiny blue foil squares are folded and pulled around an insertion tool.

Describe the sequential steps shown in the video for assembling the centerpiece kit, noting specific actions and timestamps.
canonical_answer: At 0s, the welcome title card appears on screen; at 6s, the kit assembly title is displayed; at 10s, instructional text overlays the crafting scene; at 14s, the person inserts the feathered mask into the blue base; at 18s, glue is applied to the center of the base using a red glue gun.
